completion_scope: Redis-protocol cache port and deterministic in-memory contract tests; live Valkey execution is not claimed

ordered_tdd_result.red_reason: ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND for cache.js before the T049 port existed
ordered_tdd_result.green_result: 7 cache tests passed in the clean HCP-01-approved Node.js 24.18.0 rerun; T047-T049 total 24

acceptance_evidence.namespace: pass: deployment, tenant, tenant environment, resource type/ID, resource version, policy version, and configuration version are centrally encoded into collision-resistant keys
acceptance_evidence.collision_protection: pass: envelope key mismatch is invalid for performance and closed for authorization; cross-tenant substitution never returns a hit
acceptance_evidence.classification_and_ttl: pass: four classifications, 1-86400 second TTL bounds, and configurable value-size bounds are enforced before driver writes
acceptance_evidence.invalidation: pass: exact-key and deployment/tenant/environment/resource-scoped prefix invalidation leave other tenant namespaces intact
acceptance_evidence.performance_failure: pass: misses, driver outages, write failures, and invalidation failures remain correctness-neutral
acceptance_evidence.authorization_failure: pass: absent, invalid, and unavailable cache state throw sanitized stable failures; every hit remains authoritative=false and requiresFreshAuthorization=true
acceptance_evidence.secret_exclusion: pass: credential-bearing fields and credential-shaped strings are rejected before serialization or driver access

validation.supported_runtime: pass: exact restored Node.js 24.18.0 binary and clean HCP-01-approved rerun
validation.authority: pass: 2 artifacts; owner 7 Finger Studios; classification Internal; PF-033
validation.root_verifier: pass: 10 legacy tests, 9 compatibility tests, 8 traceability requirements

next_task.scope: repository-local database request-context, pool, and repository source plus integration-contract tests; live database execution remains separately constrained
